name: Malicevorous Spoon
name_jp: マリスボラス・スプーン
desc: When a "Malicevorous" monster with a different name is Normal or Special Summoned to your side of the field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Level 2 Fiend-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Malicevorous Spoon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When a "Malicevorous" monster with a different name is Normal or Special Summoned to your side of the field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Level 2 Fiend-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Malicevorous Spoon" once per turn.
eff: When a "Malicevorous" monster with a different name is Normal or Special Summoned to your side of the field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Level 2 Fiend-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Malicevorous Spoon" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
